posts.author: d0mm3 (Dominic)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good day everyone and sorry for my English.

I really hope that you can help me.

I want to set an automation:

Customer has device X with us, all this is created.

Then I have a new board with the current devices that we have.

This is where the problem begins.

I have each customer individually in the group with the sub-item where the devices are listed individually. But as soon as one device is repaired (out of 5) it should be automatically sent to another board WITHOUT the other devices, is that even possible with a sub-element?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! So sorry for the very late reply on this! Don’t apologize for your English - it is EXCELLENT! If you are still experiencing this issue, can you write to us at support@monday.com and let us know? We will be able to work on this with you there!
